summary:
UPCOMING COLLABORATIONS AND TRAVEL PLANS: Brandon discusses his upcoming collaboration with Pastor Paul Begley, noting that they both waited for divine timing before connecting. After a long conversation where Brandon experienced prophetic visions for Begley's future—which he was instructed to withhold for now—they planned a series of interviews to be broadcasted soon. Additionally, Brandon mentions his tentative travel plans to attend Sister Billie Brim's prayer conference in Branson, Missouri, and potentially Billy Burke's revival services in Tennessee, emphasizing that he makes these decisions solely based on the Holy Spirit's guidance.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF GLOBAL CONFLICT AND GEOPOLITICS: Brandon details several prophetic visions concerning international escalations and a looming World War III. He recounts a vision of Tomahawk missiles with red tips being fired from Ukraine into Moscow, leading to severe consequences. He also references a magazine cover featuring a panda, which he interprets as Chinese President Xi Jinping maneuvering against global powers, particularly eyeing Taiwan amidst economic shaking and new tariffs. Furthermore, Brandon describes visions involving Kim Jong-un being utilized by Vladimir Putin, European ground wars involving Poland, Romania, and Belarus, battleships near Venezuela, and French President Emmanuel Macron acting as an Ishmael or forerunner to the Antichrist. He warns of surprise attacks in the Middle East, worse than October 7th, despite talks of peace agreements.

THE GREAT SHAKING AND SPIRITUAL AWAKENING: Brandon shares a divine warning that a shaking to awaken is currently happening across the earth, coinciding with the blossoming of the biblical fig tree. He prophesies an imminent, unprecedented harvest of souls and an explosion of grace before the Great Tribulation and the closing of the metaphorical ark door. According to Brandon, God is shaking the global church across all denominations to prepare them for this massive influx of new believers. He stresses that believers must set aside petty doctrinal differences to focus entirely on saving the lost before the return of Jesus Christ.

PERSONAL OBEDIENCE AND HUMILITY: Brandon recounts a specific instance where the Holy Spirit instructed him to wear bright pink shorts and sit on the front row during an evening church service. Despite feeling embarrassed, Brandon obeyed this unusual command, comparing it to historical acts of foolishness for God, such as William Seymour wearing a box on his head at Azusa Street. Brandon explains that this act was a test of obedience and surrender, revealing to him that much of the modern church is unprepared for the coming spiritual outpouring. He emphasizes that true spiritual glory requires total surrender to God.

SPIRITUAL SATURATION AND THE REFINERS FIRE: Brandon elaborates on the concept of spiritual saturation, explaining that believers must allow the Holy Spirit to repeatedly wash over their strongholds until they break. He shares his personal journey of dealing with a character issue rooted in a fear of man, noting that spiritual power and the manifestation of God's glory are directly tied to one's level of surrender and submission to the refiner's fire. Brandon encourages believers to stop relying solely on spiritual leaders for anointing and instead cultivate a deep, personal relationship with Jesus, urging them to stay in their unique calling, renew their minds with scripture, and totally yield their personal reservations to God.
rawData: [October 14, 2025]-[Going over what I saw last video]-[https://youtu.be/RegH2dxYBI8]-[Because he's put some things about October that are very strategic concerning the glory, the outpouring, and praying into it. So, Pastor Paul Begley with his channel—I don't know if many of you are familiar with Pastor Paul Begley, but he goes, 'Are you serious? Are you serious?'—that guy called me. He emailed my wife and said, 'I want to talk to your husband.' I waited because the Lord told me to, as one of his team members had reached out in August. The Lord said, 'No, don't talk to him yet.' And he didn't know that the Lord had said that to me, because the Lord had also said to him, 'Don't talk to him yet.' I thought that was interesting because after we talked yesterday—we talked for over an hour on the phone—my goodness, I tell you what, I felt the Holy Ghost. And instantaneously, when I was talking to Pastor Paul Begley on the phone, I went into the spirit and started seeing things for his future. But I wasn't allowed to tell him what I was seeing because the Holy Spirit said to save that. He said, 'Don't say that. I want you to hold that.' So there were things that the Lord was showing me. But we're going to do some broadcasts together. He wants me to talk about some things, and he's going to use it for later on and have it on his channel for you all. So I'm going to talk and do some things for him. I don't do interviews very often unless the Holy Spirit tells me to. So, I'm going to do some interviews with Paul Begley in the next couple of days, and then he's going to broadcast them on his channel. He told me maybe ten days or so—I don't remember exactly. But he said he wanted to use them, so I told him I'd do it. Like I said, I don't usually do that, so it's only by the unction of the Holy Spirit. I'm going to go on Paul Begley's channel sometime this week and do some things for him. Then I'm going to go to Sister Billie Brim's prayer conference in Branson, Missouri. I don't know what I'll do there, but she asked me to come. She said, 'Would you come?' and I said, 'I will come.' I don't know what she has in mind, but I'm going to go by the spirit of the unction for what I feel inside. If I can make it to Tennessee for Billy Burke at the Harvest Church, I will. But if the Lord has me stay at Billie's for the tent revival—there is a tent revival on her property, and they always have a fish fry and all that stuff, and she's asked me to come—I'm still praying about that. I don't know if I'll go or not, but I'm just putting my feelers out there, asking the Holy Spirit, 'What do you want me to do?' I really feel drawn to Billy Burke and his services in Tennessee. More than likely, I might go that direction because I want to support him and I already told you I would. There are so many of you traveling, but I haven't made up my mind yet; I'm still praying. That is why I wanted to give you an update about everything, because people wanted to know, 'Where are you? What's going on? Are you okay?' Yes, I'm okay. I just push things away when they get in my space. You ain't taking over me and Jesus. With YouTube, I've got to keep things real. So, we're going to go over all of that. Have I been talking thirteen minutes? Oh, man, that's too much. It's live; if this wasn't live, he would have cut it. You wouldn't have heard any of that, hardly. I usually keep it to five minutes. He might still cut it, I don't know. But let's go over the Tomahawk missiles and what the Lord showed us concerning World War III and what I believe is coming. The more I prayed into it, the more the Lord showed me. Sorry my voice is raspy, but I'm not coughing as much because I've got some good stuff and it's really helping me. I'm feeling a lot better. My voice still sounds groggy, but it's nothing like it was. And I'm drinking my soda, and this stuff is good. I told Braden I've enjoyed this cream soda by Zevia. What? Fifty percent are not from America? Get out of here! Fifty percent! Well, welcome. That's awesome; I'm glad you're here. This is not usually how I do it, but I wanted to come on and just talk to you all and say hi, say some stuff real quick, and get off here because people are freaking out, asking, 'Where is he?' I just had to take some time. I don't put my lips to that because it's dirty; I have to wipe it off. But okay, let's be real. I saw by the Spirit of God an escalation of things. And the Lord told me yesterday in my prayer time, 'I warned you that a great shaking to awaken is coming.' And when I went into the spirit yesterday driving and praying, looking ahead to the rest of the fall and going into December, He said, 'There is a shaking to awaken. It's coming, Brandon. It's here.' And I warned you to watch Israel after the 23rd of September, that a great escalation of things would start to take place concerning the fig tree. And that's where we are. That's where we are. I believe we're at a great escalation of things like we've never seen before. We're at a time on earth right now where we are seeing the fig tree blossom. The coming of the Lord Jesus Christ is right at hand, and I'm telling you all, we're about to see the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen. And the Lord told me, 'Brandon, the shaking is coming to awaken the people. Remember what I told you, they're coming in hot. They're coming in hot.' So, He wanted me to go to a church service. I'm just going to be real with you all. And He said, 'Wear pink shorts.' He said, 'I want you to sit on the front row.' And I said, 'What? You want me to go and wear pink shorts and sit on the front row?' He said, 'Yeah, it's for you and for them.' So, I got my pink shorts on. I'd show them to you if I could. It's kind of embarrassing, but I wore these pink shorts. Here, I'll show you. Can you see them? Yeah, these are bright pink shorts. And I wore these because of the unction of the Holy Spirit. The Lord said, 'Brandon, I want you to put on pink shorts and go and sit on the front row.' I said, 'Good Lord! Lord, you want me to do that?' Oh, it's my green screen now. You can't see that; I don't sit behind flowers. Is it working? Yeah. So, I went and I put on my pink shorts. Diana said, 'Are you wearing that to church?' I said, 'Yes. The Lord said to wear pink shorts, put them on, and go sit on the front row.' She goes, 'It's a night service.' I said, 'Yeah. I don't know why, but it's to humble me, I guess.' But I obeyed. And when I sat in there, with all the people dressed up, they were looking at me and I was looking at them. And He said, 'Remember, the babies are coming. How will you handle the babies? Be patient with My babies. Brandon, I tell you to do things more to check their hearts than to check yours. This isn't about you.' 'What does it have to do with me wearing pink shorts to a night service, and here I am, the guy with the big YouTube channel?' 'Just do what I asked you to do. I'm doing something.' But I obeyed. Do you know, when William Seymour said, 'Put the box on your head,' the Lord said, 'Put the box on your head and sit in the corner'? That sounds crazy, but put the box on. If He says to do it, do it. Whatever He says to do, do it, no matter if you look foolish or not. And in this case, I felt foolish, but I said, "Lord, I'll do it." So, I put the pink shorts on and I sat on the front row. I usually sit in the back, but the pastor saved me a front row seat and I had shorts on with no socks. So I sat in there and the Lord told me, he said, "Brandon, there's something more to this." So I felt the Holy Ghost. I prayed in the spirit the whole time and I could see people watching. I knew they were glaring and they're looking, but the Lord said, "I'm doing something. There's something more to this, but I just obey." So, all that to say this, he showed me a lot of my church is not ready for what's about to take place. I cannot go into the depth of what he said, but he gave me a word and he said, "Brandon, I'm going to show you something." And he said, "A lot of my church is not ready for what's about to take place in this earth." He said, "You see it, don't you? What I wanted you to see?" He downloaded things. I said, "Yes, sir." He said, "A great shaking is going to awaken a lot of the church." Now, is that concerning everybody in that church that I went to? No. He's examining the hearts of the troops through people and foolishness. Put a box on your head. William Seymour put it on. He goes, "I don't know why, but there's something about the box." And the moment he put the box on, he could have it on for 45 minutes. He could have it on for two hours. He could have it on for 10 minutes. But in his moment the Lord said to take the box off, the glory came in Azusa. So I'm learning he does things like that to me and it's a test. Will you do what I ask you to? So he told me, he said, "I'm examining my troops and a lot of them are not ready. A lot of people are not ready, Brandon, for what's coming." But they will be. I want you to hear me. He said, "I'm going to shake my church, Brandon, and there will be shaking more than what happened with Charlie. There's going to be a great awakening come and there will be a great outpouring of my spirit upon this earth like they've never seen before. For I'm giving them one last call and the boat is shutting. The door of the ark is going to close abruptly. No man knows the day or the hour, but I'm telling you, ladies and gentlemen, that the spirit of the Lord told me yesterday in my prayer time—well, not even yesterday, was it less than six hours ago? He said, 'I'm coming, Brandon. I'm coming. I warned you. I was standing at the door, Brandon, and many in my church is not awake. There's some of them that are awake. Some of them.' But he said, 'For what's about to take place in this earth, they will all be awake. Even the heathen, even the world is about to be awake. They're going to be awake.' What you want to say, they're awake. And a great—there will be so much shaking take place. Five major shakings. Five. And all of them will shake like labor pains upon a woman. He said to me, he said, 'What you're about to experience is seed time and harvest at its fullest. I have delayed the harvest of many souls, of what you have.' He said, 'My word does not return unto me void. Whatsoever a man sows, that will he also reap. You sow to the flesh, you reap of the flesh. You sow to the spirit, you reap of the spirit.' And he said, 'Many people, Brandon, have sowed and sowed, and the world has never reaped. And what you're about to see is a full manifestation of reaping that you've never seen before, called the Great Tribulation. But right now, the church is going through a great awakening.' And what he showed me, I saw it all in a vision. Seed time and harvest, right now where we are, as labor pains upon a woman, the beginning of sorrows. He said, 'That's where you are, that's right.' The dispensation of grace is about to come to an end and he said, 'You're coming to the door of the Great Tribulation. The catching away of the church is right ahead.' But a major move of God, my presence is grace, one more grace explosion right now with the church. You think what we're about to see is judgment, but it's God's grace waking you up as a good dad correcting his church. It's a good dad correcting the people, saying, 'Hey, I'm giving you one more chance.' So you experience some hardships, you experiencing some earthquakes, you experiencing things with the great birthing pains, the labor pains, all these things. You think, 'Well, that's tribulation.' No, you've never experienced what they're about to experience. You don't want to experience what's about to happen. No man has ever experienced what's about to happen. You think the disciples went through something? You think the plagues of the past were something? You have no clue of what's about to take place because the Bible says no man has ever seen what's about to take place. You think some hurricanes that were bad? Maybe some disease on some animals. Folks, tribulation will be hell on earth. And that's what I'm trying to tell you all. The Lord said to me in my prayer time, he said, 'Brandon, I'm going to give an explosion of grace. The great healing revivals of the past will hold nothing compared to what's about to take place. Salvations like you've never seen it. You're at the door of it, but my church isn't ready for it. They're still asleep. So, judgment begins in the house of the Lord first. He's shaking the church first. And you're about to see a shaking inside of the church, from the Catholics to the Baptists. It's not about the Charismatics. It's not about the Church of God. It's not about the Assemblies of God. This is about all hands on deck. Catholic, Baptist, Methodist, it don't matter what tent you're in. It's about getting the lost saved and bringing them into the saving knowledge of Jesus Christ before it's too late. The ark door's closing and it's time to put our petty differences down of what we've been always taught. 'Well, you know, they're Baptist, they're Methodist, they're Catholic.' No, we're the body of Christ moving as one, bringing in the lost and bringing them to his Son. Do you understand? And saying, 'Hey, you need to get saved because you're running out of time. Jesus is coming. Jesus is coming.' He said it in my tongues, I could hear him. And he said to me, 'Brandon, I'm coming.' Do you understand? Do you really understand that Jesus is coming? 'Oh, I've heard that before, brother.' But I'm here to tell you again tonight, today, this morning, early early morning here in America, that Jesus Christ is coming. And you're about to see a great shaking to awaken. God have mercy on those that do not wake up this time. For this is an act of grace. Leaving the 99 to go after the one. Leaving the 99 to go after the one. Are you the one? For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whosoever will believe in him should not perish but have everlasting life. So I try to tell you today what he's telling me, and he said to me, 'Brandon, I'm coming for the one right now and I want you to be prepared for what's about to take place, for a great acceleration. Acceleration is coming on my people, and it's time for acceleration. For a great harvest of souls is at your door. Be patient with my babies, for I was patient with you. They're coming in by the truckloads, by the boatloads, by the trainloads, whatever you want to say. I'm telling you, ladies and gentlemen, for what I've seen about to take place on this earth, men and women, children, boys and girls, youth, whatever, the greatest harvest of souls is coming. So, I want you just to really examine your heart. I've seen so much concerning this, and he's talking about the finances, a great shaking of the finances. Many people don't want to hear that. What did I tell you? The Holy Spirit said, "Go here." What did I tell you that I saw concerning China with that mischief panda? He had his arms folded. I want you to look at the world in 2019. The Economist, do you see this panda turning his back upon Russia? Do you see that? I think this was very odd. I saw this in a vision, and then the Lord said, "Go look at this." Can you show them? Do they see it? Okay. The panda is Xi Jinping, and he's turning his back on Canada in 2019. Pinocchio. Who's Pinocchio? Can I ask you all, who's Pinocchio? Was the war started with Ukraine yet? It wasn't. Pinocchio. I've already told you who Pinocchio was: Zelenskyy. He's on here. Didn't even know it. Isn't that interesting? I thought it was interesting. What did I tell you that I saw about Zelenskyy, that he was a puppet? He was being maneuvered like a puppet all throughout Europe. The Economist is talking about it. Look at that. He's poking Putin. Who's underneath Putin? The four horsemen of the apocalypse. I thought that's pretty interesting. What I tell you is coming: World War III over Europe. I saw a major shaking over Europe. And I saw even greater in the last video. And the Lord said, "I want you to talk about this." What did I tell you was coming with the babies? I said I saw genetically created, by AI technology, babies in the vision. Look at the stork with the bar graph, and it's carrying genetically modified babies, folks. This is programmed. Do you understand this? They're telling you demonically what they're planning. The elitists, these globalists, these people, six years ago, almost, digital ID is coming. They told you this last week, two weeks ago. They're talking about it right here. Okay. Now I want you to go up here, go over here. Go down, son. Look at that. You can go back up. Now, I'm not giving any credibility—I'm not trying to mix the prophetic with this world—but I've seen this by the Spirit of God. And the Lord said, "Go look. I'm telling you what they're planning, in prayer." And they're telling you six years in advance on this demonic magazine. Look at this. I even told you to watch Mount Fuji. It's Japan. I said a major volcano is going to blow, and that whole top of that thing was blown off, if that's what that is, a major shaking. So I just think things like that are interesting. Whenever the Lord showed me the panda, he said, "Go look at this." And I saw Xi Jinping face recognition. Look at that. See that? All that right there. Facial rec. It's all about scanning your face, getting you ready for the beast system. Look. Go down. I think there's a couple more things: the man and the baseball. What was it about the baseball? Why are they talking about baseball? There's something more to that. I was praying about it, and the scales of humanity in the hands, population control. So, enough of that. It annoys me because of the way they are. But I'm trying to tell you, the Spirit of God has been warning you through prayer, but they try to talk through magazines and stuff. But I think it's interesting. I don't know, it just—I saw the panda, but that's where we are with that panda. And I saw all the fingers pointing toward the panda, to Xi Jinping, blaming him for the economy. This was five days ago. What happened this week with China? Can anybody tell me what happened with China and America? A 100% tariff increase. That happened right after I told you that I saw Xi Jinping and the economy was in trouble, a shaking of their economy, and all the fingers were pointing at him, and he started eyeing Taiwan. He started eyeing Taiwan. I saw him turn his face toward Taiwan whenever I saw all the fingers and the economy, and everybody was upset with him, and he started looking at Taiwan. "How do we take Taiwan?" That's what I saw. Then, if everybody goes back to what I saw concerning him turning his back on—you show them that, you can show them. Do you see what do you see? He warns before it happens. The Holy Spirit warns. So, here we are with that. Then the Lord showed us about Kim Jong-un, and he said that he would try to be wooed by Putin in the days ahead. And I saw him in a sumo suit, but he had flies coming up because he stunk. And I saw flies coming up all around him. The Lord called him a social pariah, and the Lord warned me in the vision that they didn't want to deal with him, but they had to because of his nuclear capabilities and things that he had to help them. He was able to be used for help. Not that they wanted to, but they had to. And I saw them using him to do with troops and things to help back this movement concerning the global world war. Then I warned you: I saw Tomahawk missiles being shot from Ukraine going into Moscow, and I saw red tips on these rockets. Red tips, and I said, "I don't know why I'm seeing this red." And so my son says, "Dad, this is a Tomahawk missile." And I said, "Does he even have the capability to get into it?" And he said, "Yes, a certain one does." So Putin is upset as we speak right here because President Trump is saying he wants to give Ukraine those missiles that I was shown. And this is what was said today. And we warned you five days ago plus, right, that they were going to try to use this, and Ukraine ends badly? Yes, I told you it ends very badly because they used them. And I saw them going into Moscow, and it was terrible what I saw. I saw women and children running, and then this thing takes a turn and it gets ugly. Then I saw France with a black swan with an orange beak. I thought that was interesting. He said, "Watch, watch Emmanuel Macron, for remember what I told you, that he will be the forerunner to the antichrist. He is not the antichrist, but he is." And people say, "Why do you keep calling him an Ishmael?" Because Ishmael comes before Isaac. Ishmael comes before Isaac. Isaac was the promised child. But Satan always tries to mock what God did. So I always look at it that way in life: there's always an Ishmael. Don't fall for your Ishmael. Always settle for your Isaac. Because a lot of people will marry the wrong person—they get the Ishmael. They marry the Ishmael, and you should have married your Isaac. That's what I'm trying to say: don't settle for your Ishmael because he got impatient with God, and he went outside of God when God said, "It's going to come through your wife," and he settled for the concubine. So I want you to always remember that sometimes there's an Ishmael, and God wants you to have an Isaac. Don't get impatient after 20 years or whatever and go, "I'm done. God's not bringing the promise. I'll just settle for that." Well, you get your Ishmael. So, guess what? I believe that Emmanuel Macron is an Ishmael, and he'll be used in the days ahead to help lay the foundation for the Antichrist in a greater capacity before he steps on the scene. Now, I heard this pastor last night say that there's peace agreements, and talking about a five-year peace agreement concerning Israel and the Abrahamic Accords, I believe is what he was saying. And I don't know if I'm saying that right, so don't go, "Well, Brandon, you missed that," whatever. This was a five-year agreement is what he was talking about on the platform last night and saying how close we are to a major agreement. Could they extend it two more years for a seven-year peace agreement, which would be broken three and a half years into it for the antichrist to step on the scene here shortly, folks? That just shows you what he was saying. I don't know, I haven't watched the news. I've told you I took a fast. Braden gives me little bits and pieces, but I'm telling you, I do not listen. I took my phone, just—I'm done, I need a break. And so, are we that close? Because he talked about it last night in church. This was when I wore the pink shirt and the shorts, too. And so, I just know what the Lord is showing me. And I saw, "I'm dreaming of a white Christmas." And it was with a great escalation of war. And I saw all this peace agreement and all the stuff going on with Hamas and Gaza, but I saw to watch a surprise attack again, worse than October 7th. And the Lord said to me in the middle of the night, "Watch what happens. They are upset with how Israel did Iran and the nuclear capabilities. They may have a bit of a peace agreement here, trying to bring the hostages and all this stuff, right? But there's more to this. Do not let your guard down, Israel." And people say, "Well, you know, they have it coming." Whatever. I'm telling you, folks, I pray for Israel. I pray for the peace of Jerusalem. I pray for the people of Israel. I pray for the rabbis. I pray for them all. I pray for people to have a radical visitation from Jesus. But I'm telling you, folks, we're in the end of the end times. We're in the last seconds of this thing getting ready to end. So, I saw some kind of snake-looking thing that was around some Arab-looking people. I don't know who they were from the Middle East. And I saw red, white, black, white, black, white, red on a scarf that was wrapped around, looking like a coral snake, similar. And I said, "You know, I don't know what I'm looking at, but that was very interesting." So, I've been praying about that. And then I saw battleships, which I thought was interesting. And people say, "Brandon, they don't use those kind of F-16s anymore in the United States military Air Force. We use more advanced ones." Yes, but it's symbolic of something. It has nothing to do with what is there; it's a timeframe. He's trying to communicate something. You don't look at it—it's type and shadow. It's not always just black and white. God's trying to show you something that has deeper meaning than what your little peanut brain can get a hold of. You know, he's saying, "Brandon, it's F-16s on this plane." He's not talking to me saying, "Brandon, you need to know those are Warthogs or some kind of stealth or whatever." He's trying to talk about a timeframe. There's something more. You have to look into the vision of what he's showing you. Does that make sense? Everybody tries to say everything is just always... well, you know, it's like Daniel and the dreams that he was interpreting, or Joseph interpreting the dreams for the Pharaoh—it didn't mean what it meant. Joseph interpreting the dreams: seven years of famine, seven years of plentiful. What it had to do with fat cows—everybody could have been looking at the cows going, "What's going on with the cows? There must be a plague." But it was bigger than that. What are you looking into? What is God saying about the F-16s on it? There's something more about the escalation of war. And I said, "It's out by Venezuela." I said, "This battleship was out by Venezuela." So, I want you to think about what I saw concerning the communist flag of China when I saw the flag. And I told you I saw this flag. They don't even have that flag anymore. But that's what I saw behind Xi Jinping when he was eyeing Taiwan, and that flag was behind him. It was there, and I said it looks similar to Russia's flag and the old Soviet Union. But as I saw Poland up by Warsaw going to war, it was cold and they had snowsuits on in a vision with those old hats on—that fur. And the Lord said, "Watch Romania, because Romania will be involved. Watch Poland. Watch Ukraine. Watch these areas, for this is where it will be a ground war. It won't just be drones. I saw troops on the ground in Belarus. It tries to spread. So that was what our job was: to pray over these areas over the last couple of days, five days. I haven't made a video praying. I've been interceding about the enemy within, about the enemy within our nation, about homegrown terrorists, about our lone wolves, about all these things. The Lord said, "Brandon, pray for America. Pray for your President Trump. Pray for Don Jr. Pray for Eric. Pray for the girls. Pray for Barron. Pray for a hedge of protection around our nation." So, I take that very seriously. But my main focus over the last several days was: is the church waking up? Because even last night, He said, "Even with all that you see and all the glory and you feel, they're not all awake yet. There's a lot of people still asleep." He's wanting a lot more for the church to wake up. And when I saw the church that was awake, even what I was experiencing last night, as beautiful as it was, He said, "Brandon, there will be something even so much greater than what you're experiencing tonight. There'll be something so much more in the days ahead." For even the healings and the things that I was experiencing, and it was so beautiful, He said, "This is nothing compared to what's about to take place." And I know there's a lot of people that might be experiencing some amazing things, but you've never seen the glory cover this earth like water covers the sea. You've never seen. It will be as easy to maneuver in the spirit as taking a breath. As a bird flies in the air, as a fish swims in the water, He said, "For I am uncapping the wells of revival, and Brandon, the people of old—Oral Roberts, Jack Coe, William Brandon, Kathryn Kuhlman—they would just come up to the well and they got a cup full and they drank it. But I'm going to allow you to go to the bottom of that well and become totally submersed in the glory."
